/CAL:SENTENCING/X:SENTENCE AS TO ALL COUNTS/CCC:ALL COUNTS/DNACOMP/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 1Y/CTS:255/X:DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLY WITH TERMS OF INDIVIDUAL TREATMENT AND REHABILITATION PLAN AS DIRECTED BY ADULT PROBATION,/X:AS FURTHER TERMS OF PROBATION DEFENDANT SHALL:/X:1, NOT WORK AS A BUILDINGCONTRACTOR UNLESS AND UNTIL HE OBTAINS A CONTRACTOR'S LICENSE AND WORKERS'COMPENSATION INSURANCE,/X:2, NOT HIRE WORKERS FOR CONSTRUCTION, REMODELINGOR RENOVATION WORK WITHOUT A CONTRACTOR'S LICENSE OR WORKERS' COMPENSATIONINSURANCE,/X:3, REPORT ALL PAYROLL TO WORKERS' COMPENSATION INSURANCE CARRIER AND EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT (EDD),/X:4, COMPLY WITH ALL LABOR CODE STATUTES GOVERNING PAYMENT OF WAGES TO WORKERS, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE FOLLOWING:/X:LABOR CODE SECTIONS 202, 204, 204B, 207, 208 AND 212,/X:DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A RESTITUTION TOTAL OF $81,778,50 PLUS INTEREST AS OF TODAY AND A 15% ADMINISTRATIVE FEE TO VICTIMS AS FOLLOWS:/ /X:$1,750 TO GILBERTO AJVIX PAREDES; $2,470 TO MARGARITO FLORES CHANCHO; $1,057,50TO ELMER GUSTAVO TACATIC;/X:$5,320 TO SHI MING YU; $4,570 TO YAO XIN YU;$32,215 TO CHIO LENG CHEONG; $34,396 TO ANTHONY AND JENNY TANG/X:ORDER FORRESTITUTION AND ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT AS TOEACH VICTIM,/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE40/ICNA/X:UPON FULL PAYMENT OF RESTITUTION AND SUCCESSFUL PROBATION AT THAT TIME, DEFENDANT MAY PETITION COURT TO REDUCE COUNTS 4 AND 5/X:PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) WITHOUT OPPOSITION FROM DISTRICT ATTORNEY,/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/
